name: seed-skills
description: Optional skill bundles from the Loam. Install on demand — not shipped to bootstrapped projects by default.

plugins.name: helpers
plugins.description: Utility skills (decision-matrix, navigate, model-route, prompt-improver, grill-research)

plugins.name: business-process
plugins.description: Business process skills (process-optimizer, sop-writer, workflow-mapper, weekly-review)

plugins.name: pocock-engineering
plugins.description: Engineering workflow skills adapted from mattpocock/skills (triage, to-issues, tdd, prototype, diagnose, grill-with-docs, improve-codebase-architecture)

plugins.name: web-frontend-anthropics
plugins.description: Vetted web/UI skills from anthropics/skills, SHA-pinned via git-subdir: web-artifacts-builder (claude.ai bundle.html artifacts), webapp-testing (Playwright UI verification), theme-factory (challenger vs ui-ux-pro-max). Installs DISABLED (defaultEnabled:false) — enable to trial.

plugins.name: web-frontend-vercel
plugins.description: Vetted React/UI skills from vercel-labs/agent-skills, SHA-pinned via git-subdir: react-best-practices, react-view-transitions (view-transition animation), composition-patterns, web-design-guidelines (challenger vs impeccable). Installs DISABLED (defaultEnabled:false) — enable to trial.

plugins.name: web-frontend-find-skills
plugins.description: Vetted: find-skills (on-demand skill discovery/loader) from vercel-labs/skills, SHA-pinned via git-subdir. Installs DISABLED (defaultEnabled:false) — enable to trial.

plugins.name: web-frontend-taste
plugins.description: Vetted: design-taste-frontend v2-experimental (challenger vs impeccable; landing pages/portfolios/redesigns only, NOT dashboards/product UI) from Leonxlnx/taste-skill, SHA-pinned via git-subdir. Folder taste-skill maps to install name design-taste-frontend. Installs DISABLED (defaultEnabled:false) — enable to trial.
